name: explain-code-to-peer
description: One teammate explains a code path to a peer; the recipient paraphrases the behavior back to demonstrate shared understanding.
lead_prompt_template: In {repo}, {assigned_to_a} should explain the relevant event-recording path to {assigned_to_b} using peer-DM. {assigned_to_b} must paraphrase the explanation back with the key data flow and failure modes. Do not pivot through the lead unless blocked.
